title: H4ckerGr33n
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ff9c496f00d4336e48720425d29f4d1e0e75ad1.png)
**Pack Version** (Last)**:** v1.1

**Created by:** 
> Me ( [@GalacticUniv](https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R) )

**Available in the following versions:**
> 1.16 - 1.20.1 | 1.20.2+

**Tags**: 
> Custom, Colors, Black, Green, 16x, Hacker

**Description:**
> H4ckerSh1t was the first texture pack I created for the "Colors" collection. Inspired by the color green, it reminded me of hackers from a certain period in my life—something that initially had a negative connotation for me. But I turned it into something positive instead.

> With a hacker theme and that iconic "Matrix" imagery of falling green letters, this texture pack was more of an experiment than anything else. It introduced a lot of new elements I wasn’t very familiar with at the time, such as animated textures, which I was still learning to handle properly.

> Don't forget that downloading the texture pack from the official sources (In PlanetMinecraft) is a huge way to support us! <3

> If you have any questions or want to report a bug, feel free to do so through our official Discord:
> <https://discord.gg/72dHTWJr6R>

> You can also follow us on social media! :D
> <https://solo.to/galacticuniv> 

![Compatible with](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/960c76ddd8a7ab7c7e79ad788f87bc2899f76960_0.webp)
